title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.677 - School children, parental authorization required for telehealth
text:
208.677.  School children, parental authorization required for telehealth. — Prior to the provision of telehealth services in a school, the parent or guardian of the child shall provide authorization for the provision of such service.  Such authorization shall include the ability for the parent or guardian to authorize services via telehealth in the school for the remainder of the school year.
(L. 2016 S.B. 579, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1617 merged with S.B. 951)
